page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g7.16xlarge demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, placing in the top 25% for multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench. It also shows strong performance in software compilation, ray tracing, image processing, and database operations. Single-core performance, including single-core stress-ng and Geekbench scores, falls in the average range. Memory bandwidth tests reveal high performance for cached small-block reads, while uncached large-block reads and writes perform at average levels.

Given its balanced resource allocation and strong multi-threaded performance, this instance is well-suited for multi-threaded workloads such as software compilation, database operations, static web serving, and small-scale LLM inference. However, the lack of local NVMe storage and GPU acceleration makes it less suitable for heavy storage-I/O bound databases or large-scale deep learning training. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory bandwidth make it a reliable choice for enterprise applications requiring predictable compute density without the premium of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz and 256.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. It lacks local storage and GPU hardware, but offers a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance, high cached memory bandwidth, and strong results in software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations, while single-core metrics remain average. This profile makes the ecs.g7.16xlarge highly effective for multi-threaded enterprise workloads, static web serving, and database applications that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core general-purpose instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and balanced memory for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs and 256 GB RAM
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and software compilation performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for multi-threaded enterprise applications and web serving
